200.description: API health status for launch and smoke checks.
Current authenticated user identity, roles, and resolved app access.

401.description: No active authenticated user is available.

403.description: The authenticated user is inactive or archived.

200.description: Active organization units for the current brother user.

403.description: The current user is not an active brother.

404.description: No active membership organization unit exists for the current brother.

200.description: Active organization units visible to the current admin scope.

403.description: The current user does not have Admin Lite access.

400.description: The organization unit create payload failed validation.

403.description: Only Super Admin can create organization unit records.

400.description: The organization unit update payload failed validation.

403.description: Only Super Admin can update or archive organization unit records.

200.description: Public home discovery payload with no private content.

404.description: No published public content page matched the slug and language fallback.

200.description: Published public prayer categories and prayers.

404.description: No published public prayer matched the id.

200.description: Published public and family-open event summaries.
Published public or family-open event detail.

404.description: No published public or family-open event matched the id.
